subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants near unto the throne of Grandeur! Truthfulness and sincerity are the character and conduct of the Persian friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده مقرب درگاه کبریا یاران پارسی را صدق و راستی خلق و خوی است و رفتار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @eulogies; reminiscences, @love of God
